2000.description: Census Bureau co-est00int-tot.csv: 2000-2010 intercensal county estimates
2000.note: ESTIMATESBASE2000 is the April 1 2000 Census count adjusted to match the 2010 Census geography; use as the decennial Census count for 2000.

2010.description: Census Bureau co-est2020.csv: 2010-2020 county population estimates
2010.note: CENSUS2010POP is the April 1 2010 Census count.

1950_to_1990.description: NBER Census U.S. Decennial County Population Data 1900-1990 (cencounts.csv)

quirks: VA 51760 (Richmond city) present in 2010 — VA independent cities included
CT 09001 (Fairfield County) present in 2010 — CT historical counties intact
notes: FIPS codes output as-is from each source; no remapping applied (consumer handles Shannon/Oglala Lakota SD 46113->46102 and Dade->Miami-Dade FL 12025->12086 fallbacks).
DC (FIPS prefix 11) excluded. PR (FIPS prefix 72) excluded.
Historical approximation use only: county populations for ratio-scaling grid cells.
NBER source counties may reflect Census geography of the decade; boundary changes between decades are not reconciled in this file.
